messages.content:
Context:
Quality
Objective:
- Ensure high-quality deliverable and/or support by following industry-wide standards and best practices.

Measurable Criteria:
﻿Criteria for 5-Outstanding rating:
- Always delivers or provides high quality deliverable or support.
- Minimal or no defects/issues in deliverable or support work over the entire year.

Previously i had aded for last 2 quarters 
Consistently completed tasks and with detail to quality of work
& focus on expansive code change and for that streamlined the process including client communication, development and QA testing.

Can you give me a 2 line self feedback for this

I consistently delivered high-quality work over the past two quarters, ensuring minimal defects or issues. I streamlined the process, including client communication and QA testing, to ensure an expansive code change with attention to detail.

I consistently delivered high-quality work over the past year, ensuring minimal defects or issues. I improved, by streamlining my workflow to ensure even bigger code changes are upto the mark with attention to detail.
Fix this

I consistently delivered high-quality work throughout the year, with minimal defects or issues. I improved my workflow by streamlining processes, allowing for more extensive code changes while maintaining attention to detail.

Now same thing for  new context:
Process Adherence
Objective:
- Ensure compliance towards all processes including
1. Project Delivery and/or Support processes. 
2. Timesheets.
3. Meeting attendance.
4. Status reporting.

Measurable Criteria:
﻿Criteria for 5-Outstanding rating:
- Always complies with the following processes and hygiene factors 
1. Project Delivery and/or Support processes.
2. Timesheets.
3. Meeting attendance.
4. Status reporting.

Previous:
"Generally followed coding guidelines well.
Produced good quality code but could pay more attention to Go standards."
Slight room for streamlining and efficiency improvements., specifically on status updates.
Consistently adhered to coding guidelines for assigned tasks
Generally followed JIRA processes with diligence, committed to established workflows.

Give me self assesment for 4 star rating accordingly

I consistently adhered to coding guidelines and JIRA processes with diligence, ensuring good quality code. However, there is room for improvement in following Go standards more closely and providing more efficient status updates. I will focus on streamlining processes and improving efficiency to meet the criteria for a 5-star rating.
there was room and i improved

I significantly improved my adherence to coding guidelines, Go standards, and JIRA processes, resulting in higher quality code and improved efficiency. I also made progress in providing more efficient and consistent status updates. I am on track to meet the criteria for a 5-star rating.
initailly there was some room and later on in the year i improved

Initially, there was some room for improvement in adhering to coding guidelines, Go standards, and JIRA processes. However, I made significant improvements throughout the year by actively working on streamlining processes and focusing on efficiency. Consequently, I successfully enhanced my adherence to these processes, resulting in higher quality work.

New context:
Objective:
- Ensure sharing of knowledge across the entire team and train others.
- Enhance technical skills across the technology stack or set of tools through Certification and Upskilling.
- Enhance application knowledge over a period of time on the way to become a subject matter expert.
- Attend mandatory Trainings (Information Security Awareness Training - KnowB4).
-- Contribution to Practice (POCs, mentoring & Tech Session)

Measurable Criteria:
Criteria for 5-Outstanding rating:
- Obvious "go to" person from a technical and application standpoint who sets the standard for others.
- Coaches, mentors and trains others (brings others along).
- Complete Information Security Awarness training on time for self and team.
-Improve self learning through certification and upskilling with seconday skill to meet the organization buiness requirements.
- Contributing to Practices through POCs , Tech session and mentoring Junior Engineers.

Previous:
Successfully completed all required training modules
completed multiple skill development course relating to go and microservices, participated in MSYS Tech Talks to enhance their knowledge base and stay updated.
Mentored and successfully onboarded 3 fresher resources onto the team in the period of 2 months
Took comprehensive technical assesment of Golang candidates whose experience ranged from 2 to 12 years, and so accordingly assessed them. Added value to the knowledge base of the Golang interviewing team by adding new standard theory and programming questions.

I successfully completed all required training modules, including the Information Security Awareness training. Additionally, I actively pursued skill development courses related to Go and microservices, and actively participated in MSYS Tech Talks to enhance my knowledge base and stay updated. I also mentored and successfully onboarded three fresher resources onto the team within a span of two months. Additionally, I took comprehensive technical assessments of Golang candidates and added value to the knowledge base of the Golang interviewing team by introducing new standard theory and programming questions. I have consistently contributed to the team's knowledge sharing and training efforts, positioning myself as a go-to person for technical and application expertise.
Brifer

I actively completed all required training modules and skill development courses, including Information Security Awareness training. I mentored and successfully onboarded three new team members within a two-month period. I also made valuable contributions by conducting comprehensive technical assessments for Golang candidates and enhancing the knowledge base of the Golang interviewing team. Overall, I have consistently demonstrated a commitment to knowledge sharing and training efforts, establishing myself as a go-to person for technical and application expertise.

NewContext:

Behavioural aspects
Objective:
- Approaching problems with an open mind, seizing opportunities, feeling empowered, using initiative, demonstrating a positive mindset when challenged.

Measurable Criteria:
Criteria for 5-Outstanding rating:
- Demonstrates and applies the knowledge and skills to perform their role effectively.
- Understands and works within company regulation and culture, following laws, policies, regulations, and procedures.
- Continuously works to improve.
- Communicates with others, sharing and building knowledge with others.
- Collaborates with others across the organization, offering assistance and actively being helpful where needed.
- Effectively chooses and utilizes tools and knowledge to complete a task.

Create for 4.5, also use all previous contexts

Throughout the year, I consistently demonstrated and applied my knowledge and skills effectively, while also understanding and working within company regulations and culture. I continuously sought opportunities to improve myself and actively shared and built knowledge with others through effective communication. I collaborated with colleagues across the organization, offering assistance and actively being helpful whenever needed. Moreover, I made efficient use of tools and knowledge to effectively complete tasks. These efforts positioned me at a level of 4.5, with clear progress towards meeting the criteria for an outstanding rating in the behavioural aspects.

Dont follow the exact points, its too obvious that I am using it as reference. Same points but more natural and dont metion 4.5.
This is a profeessional self assesment

Throughout the year, I consistently demonstrated and applied my knowledge and skills effectively in performing my role. I have a strong understanding of and adhere to company regulations, policies, and procedures, contributing to a positive work culture. I actively seek opportunities for self-improvement, continuously working to enhance my skills and knowledge.

Effective communication has been a key aspect of my approach, as I actively share and build knowledge with others. I have actively collaborated with colleagues across the organization, offering assistance and being helpful wherever needed. Additionally, I have made efficient use of tools and knowledge to complete tasks, ensuring that they are carried out effectively and efficiently.

Overall, by approaching problems with an open mind, utilizing my initiative, and maintaining a positive mindset when challenged, I have demonstrated a commitment to excellent performance in behavioral aspects.
Briefer

Throughout the year, I consistently demonstrated effective application of my knowledge and skills in my role. I have a solid understanding of company regulations and culture, adhering to laws, policies, and procedures. I actively pursue opportunities for self-improvement and continuously work to enhance my skills. Communication and collaboration are key strengths, as I actively share and build knowledge with others, offering assistance where needed. I also make efficient use of tools and knowledge to complete tasks effectively. Overall, my approach to problem-solving is open-minded and proactive, with a positive mindset when faced with challenges.

Modify , Throughout the year, I consistently demonstrated effective application of my knowledge and skills in my role. I have a solid understanding of company regulations and culture, adhering to laws, policies, and procedures. I actively pursue opportunities for self-improvement and continuously work to enhance my skills. Communication and collaboration are key strengths, as I actively share and build knowledge with others, offering assistance where needed. I also make efficient use of tools and knowledge to complete tasks effectively. Overall, my approach to problem-solving is open-minded and proactive, with a positive mindset when faced with challenges.

instead of being perfect, it should bemaking effort, having a good understanding,, building towards etc

Throughout the year, I consistently made efforts to apply my knowledge and skills effectively in my role. I have a good understanding of company regulations and culture, actively adhering to laws, policies, and procedures. I am proactive in seeking opportunities for self-improvement and continuously working towards enhancing my skills. Effective communication and collaboration are key strengths, as I actively share and build knowledge with others, offering assistance where needed. I make efficient use of tools and knowledge to effectively complete tasks. Overall, my approach to problem-solving is open-minded and proactive, maintaining a positive mindset when faced with challenges.
